calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-25-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-25-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-21-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report
Off Calendar May-01-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Former Administrator'S Final Account
Off Calendar Feb-06-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-21-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Phyllis Berenson, via Zoom, for LaShawndra J. Breston, Administrator, and Barbara DeVries, Petitioner/proposed Successor Administrator; Darius Price, via Zoom, interested Party.

The court confirms with Mr. Price that he is not appearing this morning to object to the appointment of Barbara DeVries as Successor Administrator. Mr. Price requests confirmation as to why the current Administrator is resigning and what exactly the Administrator's duties will be. Ms. Berenson reports as to why Ms. Breston is resigning. The court summarizes the Administrator's duties and responsibilities and reconfirms with Mr. Price of the court's tentative ruling to appoint Ms. Devries. No objection is presented. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Barbara DeVries is appointed Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $641,000. Frank Mahoney III remains probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate currently set for Oct-02-2023 is off calendar and a new Status on close of estate is set for Dec-11-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Status of Former Administrator's Final Account is set for Feb-06-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Ms. Berenson reports that her client did not access any of the estates' accounts and therefore the accounting will not include much information. The court reminds counsel of probate section 11952.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-12-2022 Granted Per Written Order
